title: AN ACT CREATING THREE ADDITIONAL POSITIONS OF ASSISTANT CITY FISCAL IN THE CITY OF CEBU BY AMENDING THE CHARTER OF THE SAID CITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3796 / 56 OG No. 44, 6740 (October 31, 1960)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2666, June 18, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THREE ADDITIONAL POSITIONS OF ASSISTANT CITY FISCAL IN THE CITY OF CEBU BY AMENDING THE CHARTER OF THE SAID CITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The last paragraph of Section thirty-seven of Commonwealth Act Numbered Fifty-eight, as amended by Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred thirty-three, is further amended to read as follows:

"The fiscal of the city and his assistants shall receive the salaries hereinafter set forth, which shall be paid by the City of Cebu; fiscal of the city, six thousand pesos

per annum

; first assistant fiscal, four thousand six hundred pesos

per annum

; second assistant fiscal, four thousand two hundred pesos

per annum

; and six third assistant fiscals, three thousand six hundred pesos

per annum

each."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1960.
